html:
<script>
// ============================================================================
// GLOBAL AMCHARTS v5 LOADER — Add this ONCE at the top of your page
// ============================================================================
window.AMCHARTS_LOADER = (function() {
  const AMCHARTS_CONFIG = {
    licenseKey: 'AM5C-3736-6373-6263',
    cdnBase: 'https://cdn.amcharts.com/lib/5/',
    scripts: [
      '{ file: 'index.js',
      'ready: () => !!(window.am5 && window.am5.Root) }',
      '{ file: 'percent.js',
      'ready: () => !!(window.am5 && window.am5.PieChart) }',
      '{ file: 'xy.js',
      'ready: () => !!(window.am5 && window.am5.XYChart) }',
      '{ file: 'radar.js',
      'ready: () => !!(window.am5radar && window.am5radar.RadarChart) }',
      '{ file: 'gauge.js',
      'ready: () => !!(window.am5radar && window.am5radar.ClockHand) }',
      '{ file: 'themes/Animated.js',
      'ready: () => !!window.am5themes_Animated }',
      'index.js',
      'themes/Animated.js',
      'percent.js'
    ]
  };

  let loadingPromise = null;

  function loadScript(src) {
    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      const existing = document.querySelector(`script[src="${src}"]`);
      if (existing) { resolve(src); return; }
      const script = document.createElement('script');
      script.src = src;
      script.onload = () => resolve(src);
      script.onerror = () => reject(new Error(`Failed to load: ${src}`));
      document.head.appendChild(script);
    });
  }

  async function loadAmCharts() {
    console.log('🔄 Loading amCharts v5 libraries...');
    try {
      for (const file of AMCHARTS_CONFIG.scripts) {
        const url = AMCHARTS_CONFIG.cdnBase + file;
        await loadScript(url);
        console.log(`  ✓ Loaded: ${file}`);
      }
      if (window.am5 && AMCHARTS_CONFIG.licenseKey) {
        am5.addLicense(AMCHARTS_CONFIG.licenseKey);
        console.log('  ✓ License key applied');
      }
      console.log('✅ amCharts v5 loaded successfully');
      return true;
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('❌ Error loading amCharts:', error);
      throw error;
    }
  }

  return {
    load: function() {
      if (loadingPromise) return loadingPromise;
      if (window.am5 && window.am5percent && window.am5xy && window.am5themes_Animated) {
        console.log('✅ amCharts already loaded');
        return Promise.resolve(true);
      }
      loadingPromise = loadAmCharts();
      return loadingPromise;
    }
  };
})();
</script>
